sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_encryption (id UInt32, ciphertext String);
SELECT id, aes_decrypt_mysql('aes-256-ofb', unhex(ciphertext), '123456789101213141516171819202122', 'iviviviviviviviv123456') AS plaintext FROM test_encryption;
UPDATE test_encryption SET ciphertext = aes_encrypt('UpdatedSecret', '123456789101213141516171819202122', 'iviviviviviviviv123456') WHERE id = 1;
